title: Simple Player Freeze
description: Simple Player Freeze – A lightweight, vanilla-compatible datapack that lets you instantly freeze or unfreeze all players on your server.

![Platform](https://img.shields.io/badge/Server-Fabric%20%7C%20Forge%20%7C%20Vanilla-ffaa00?style=for-the-badge)

# ❄️ Simple Freeze Datapack

_Bypass plugins. Skip mods. Freeze every player instantly — pure vanilla power._   

![Works on Fabric](https://img.shields.io/badge/Fabric-Supported-1976d2?style=flat-square&logo=fabricmc)
![Works on Forge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Forge-Supported-f39c12?style=flat-square&logo=curseforge)
![100% Vanilla](https://img.shields.io/badge/Vanilla-Compatible-4caf50?style=flat-square)

---

## 🔎 Summary

**Simple Freeze Datapack** is a lightweight, fully-vanilla Minecraft datapack that lets server owners instantly **freeze** or **unfreeze** all players at once.  
It adds two simple functions:

/function simple_freeze:freeze
/function simple_freeze:unfreeze

No mods required.  
No plugins required.  
Compatible with **Fabric**, **Forge**, **Quilt**, **Paper**, **Spigot**, and **Vanilla** servers.

---

# 📖 Description

The **Simple Freeze Datapack** gives you instant control over player movement on your server.  
Perfect for **events**, **minigames**, **announcements**, **roleplay**, or **admin control**, this datapack lets you stop all players in place with a single function call.

It uses only built-in vanilla commands, making it **version-independent**, **modloader-independent**, and **extremely lightweight**.

![Zero Lag](https://img.shields.io/badge/Performance-Zero_Lag-4caf50?style=flat-square)

---

## 🧊 Freeze Players

Use the main freeze function:

/function simple_freeze:freeze

This applies powerful movement-blocking effects to **all players**:

- **Slowness 255** – completely disables walking  
- **Jump Boost 250** – prevents jumping  
- **Mining Fatigue 255** – blocks breaking and interacting  

Players remain online and visible — but fully immobilized.

---

## 🔥 Unfreeze Players

Restore normal gameplay instantly:

/function simple_freeeze:unfreeze

This removes all relevant effects and returns players to normal movement.

---

## ⭐ Features

- ✔️ 100% **vanilla-compatible**  
- ✔️ Works on **all Minecraft versions (1.13+)**  
- ✔️ Works on Fabric, Forge, Quilt, Paper, Spigot, Vanilla  
- ✔️ No mods or plugins required  
- ✔️ Extremely lightweight  
- ✔️ Instant global freeze / unfreeze  
- ✔️ Perfect for events, announcements, RP, classrooms, minigames, etc.

---

## 🧩 Compatibility

This datapack works on **every version** from 1.13+ including:

- 1.21.x  
- 1.20.x  
- 1.19.x  
- 1.18.x  
- 1.17.x  
- …and all other versions that support datapacks.

Because it uses only `/effect` and `/function`, it is not affected by modloader changes.

![Platform](https://img.shields.io/badge/Server-Fabric%20%7C%20Forge%20%7C%20Vanilla-ffaa00?style=for-the-badge)

---

## 📦 Installation

1. Download the datapack `.zip`  
2. Drag it into your world:
world/datapacks/

3. Run:
/reload

4. Done! You can now use:
/function simple_freeze:freeze
/function simple_freeze:unfreeze

---

## 📝 Use Cases

- 🏆 Event hosting  
- 🎮 Minigame start/stop  
- 📢 Server-wide announcements  
- 🎭 Roleplay and scripted scenes  
- 🧪 Classroom or education servers  
- 🔧 Admin control
